problem_solved: Clinicians spend excessive time on documentation and administrative tasks, leading to burnout and reduced patient-facing time
solution_description: AI-powered clinical copilot that automatically generates medical notes, referrals, sick notes, and visit summaries from patient consultations. Supports 50+ specialties with hands-free voice editing, ICD-10/SNOMED coding suggestions, and seamless EHR integration
traction_signals: Trusted by 5,000+ care organisations across Europe
Region Gävleborg signed 2-year contract for primary care
Partnership with Accurx to deliver AI medical scribe to 200,000 NHS staff
375,000+ notes generated across care levels in European health system
ISO 13485, ISO 27001, GDPR, NHS DSPT compliant
notes: Strong Nordic presence with Swedish roots. Offers both Swedish and English interfaces. NHS DSPT compliance enables UK expansion. Built by in-house clinicians who understand care workflows
